steps.title: Spot the logical link between the clauses
steps.content: The first clause states that the Center has cultivated a multigenerational community of Black creatives; the second clause says it has garnered a reputation as a hub of Black art and culture. The second clause follows as a result of the first, so we need a transition that shows consequence.

steps.title: Choose the transition that signals a result
steps.content: 'accordingly,' means 'as a result' and correctly links the clauses as cause and effect. The other three either signal contrast ('on the other hand,' 'nevertheless') or mere timing ('periodically'), which do not fit the result relationship. That matches choice A — A is correct.
